# terrible_community_general_aix_lvol (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `lv` (String) The name of the logical volume.
- `vg` (String) The volume group this logical volume is part of.

### Optional

- `copies` (Number) The number of copies of the logical volume. Maximum copies are 3.
- `lv_type` (String) The type of the logical volume.
- `opts` (String) Free-form options to be passed to the mklv command.
- `policy` (String) Sets the interphysical volume allocation policy. `maximum` allocates logical partitions across the maximum number of physical volumes. `minimum` allocates logical partitions across the minimum number of physical volumes.
- `pvs` (String) A list of physical volumes, for example `[hdisk1, hdisk2]`.
- `size` (String) The size of the logical volume with one of the [MGT] units.
- `state` (String) Control if the logical volume exists. If `present` and the volume does not already exist then the `size` option is required.

### Read-Only

- `msg` (String) A friendly message describing the task result.
